cases.prompt: 이 링크 읽어줘: https://example.com/blog/post 정리해서 깔끔하게 보여줘.

assertions.text: Extracts clean markdown via the Defuddle CLI using defuddle parse <url> --md.
Strips navigation, ads, and clutter to save tokens instead of using WebFetch on the raw HTML.
Returns clean readable markdown content from the page.

cases.prompt: Read and analyze this URL and give me the cleaned-up content: https://docs.example.com/guide

assertions.text: Always uses the --md flag for markdown output and can save to a file with -o.
Prefers Defuddle over WebFetch for standard web pages to reduce token usage.
Does not use Defuddle for URLs ending in .md (uses WebFetch directly for those).
